---
name: Task
about: Any work item — feature, fix, refactor, exploration, or doc change.
title: ''
labels: []
---

## Goal
<!-- One plain sentence. What do we want? -->

## Done when
<!-- One or more bullets. Each must be mechanically verifiable (file exists, test passes, command succeeds, metric hits threshold). -->
-

## Notes
<!-- Optional. Background, constraints, links to prior discussion, or "don't touch X". -->

---
**Labels to apply** (remove before submitting):
- Size: `size:xs` (<30 lines) / `size:s` (<100) / `size:m` / `size:l`
- Agent: `agent:claude-local` / `agent:codex-local` / `agent:copilot-cloud` / `agent:any`
- Status: `status:planning` / `status:in-progress` / `status:needs-review` / `status:blocked`
- Kind: `exploration` (ok without Done-when) / leave blank for concrete tasks
